description: A relatively simple modification of some of a TEC-9's internal fire-control components, converting it to a fully-automatic-only machine pistol.  Calling this hilariously illegal would be an understatement, but anyone who'd care is probably long gone by now.
//2: This is just my best guess at how converting a Tec-9 to full auto would work after staring at it in World of Guns.

description: A set of seals and gaskets that will allow a firearm to operate reliably while submerged in water.
